name: current-2026-role-v3-conservative-tailguard-sweep
description: Full 2026 replay testing whether an even more conservative RoleV3 TailGuard weight improves stability between no TailGuard and the promoted TW=0.20 candidate.

notes: TW=0.10 and TW=0.15 are intentionally modest corrections; they test whether the existing final model can be improved by shrinking the tail adjustment instead of making it more aggressive.
Promotion still requires no-future replay, low leakage risk, and comparison against the current TW=0.20 defended model.
